Card reward: Pressure Points (1E, apply 8 Mark, all enemies lose HP=Mark), Just Lucky (0E, 3 dmg, 2 block, Scry 1), Meditate (1E, retrieve 1 card from discard, enter Calm, end turn).

Meditate is excellent for stance cycling - it enters Calm (setting up next turn Wrath entry), retrieves a key card, and gives Retain. It is a core piece of the stance dance engine.

Just Lucky is a 0-cost attack that provides block and scry - decent filler but not an engine piece.

Pressure Points is the Mark archetype - scaling damage without stances, but needs multiple copies to work and is a completely different build path.

For Directive 3 (testing Watcher archetypes), I should lean into stance dancing since I already have Eruption+. Meditate is the clear pick - it gives a Calm entry card (only Vigilance currently) and retrieves key cards.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Jaw Worm
FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block)
WIN CONDITION: Kill before Bellow stacks too much Strength.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block 11 damage turn 1 (Chomp). Need 11+ block.
KEY CARDS: Eruption+ for Wrath damage, Meditate for cycling.
RISKS: Bellow gives +3 Str, makes future Chomps hit harder. Kill fast.

Turn 1 - Incoming: 11 (Chomp, always first move)
Hand: Miracle(0E), Defend(1E), Strike x2(1E), Eruption+(1E), Meditate(1E). 3E + Miracle = 4E.
Path A: Eruption+ (9 dmg, enter Wrath) + Strike in Wrath (12 dmg) + Defend (5 block) = 3E, 21 dmg, 5 block. Take 6 damage. But in Wrath next turn I take double.
Path B: Miracle(+1E) + Eruption+ (9 dmg, enter Wrath) + Strike in Wrath (12) + Meditate (enter Calm, end turn, retrieve card) = 4E, 21 dmg. But Meditate ends turn and gives 0 block. Take 11 damage.
Path C: Miracle(+1E) + Defend + Defend? No, only 1 Defend in hand. Defend(5) + Eruption+(9, enter Wrath) + Strike in Wrath(12) = 3E+1 Miracle, 21 dmg, 5 block. Take 6.
Path D: Miracle + 2 attacks in no-stance + Defend = Eruption+(9) + Strike(6) + Defend(5) = 3E, 15 dmg, 5 block. If I play Eruption AFTER strike: Strike(6) then Eruption+(9, enter Wrath) = 15 dmg, then Miracle+Defend = 5 block. Take 6.

Best: Miracle + Strike(6) + Eruption+(9 dmg, enter Wrath) + Strike in Wrath(12) = 4E, 27 dmg. But 0 block, take 11 in Wrath = 22.
No - better to block. Let me do: Miracle(+1E=4E) + Eruption+(9 enter Wrath) + Strike in Wrath(12) + Defend(5 in Wrath? No, Defend gives 5 block regardless of stance). = 3E spent, 21 dmg, 5 block. Take 6.

Actually the best damage with some block: Miracle + Eruption+ on Jaw Worm (9) + Strike in Wrath (12) + Defend (5 block) = 3E+Miracle. 21 damage, 5 block. Take 6 in Wrath (11-5=6, doubled = 12). WAIT - am I in Wrath when taking damage? Yes! So incoming 11 is DOUBLED to 22 in Wrath. 5 block absorbs 5, take 17.

This is terrible. I need to EXIT Wrath. Use Meditate to enter Calm.
Miracle + Eruption+(9, enter Wrath) + Strike in Wrath(12) + Meditate(enter Calm, end turn, pick card) = 4E. 21 damage. Meditate enters Calm and ends turn. In Calm, 11 incoming, 0 block = take 11.

Or: Just dont enter Wrath. Strike + Strike + Defend + Miracle + Defend? Only 1 Defend. 
Miracle(+1E) + Strike(6) + Strike(6) + Defend(5) = 3E, 12 dmg, 5 block. Take 6. Save Eruption and Meditate.

Hmm. Actually: Play Miracle + Eruption+(9, Wrath) + Meditate(1E, Calm, end turn, retrieve Defend). = 2E from Miracle. Total 21 damage vs 40 HP Jaw Worm (leaves 19). I take 11 damage (in Calm, not Wrath). And I get a card back. But only 21 damage and take 11.

Or: Miracle + Strike(6) + Strike(6) + Defend(5) + Meditate(Calm, end turn). = 4E used. 12 dmg, 5 block. Take 6. Retrieve Eruption+ from discard for next turn.

Actually wait: if I end in Calm, next turn I get +2E from leaving Calm when I play Eruption+. 

Lets minimize damage: Miracle + Strike + Strike + Defend = 12 dmg, 5 block, take 6. 1E left. Then Meditate to enter Calm (retrieve Eruption+ from discard) and end turn. 12 dmg, 5 block, take 6. Next turn I start in Calm with Eruption+ retained in hand.

This is the play. 6 damage taken, and next turn I have an amazing setup.
